problem_text_cn: 质量m₁的小球连在倔强系数k的弹簧一端，弹簧另一端连在质量m₂的薄球壳内壁（自由长度=球壳半径R）。初始时弹簧竖直，小球在力平衡点P下方Q点（间距H），用细绳固定。断开细绳后球壳无碰撞升降，升离与落回时小球高度相同。1. 导出最小H的公式组；2. 若m₁=m₂=m，k=10mg/R，计算最小H（系数精确到两位有效数字）。
problem_text_en: A small ball of mass m₁ is connected to one end of a spring with spring constant k, and the other end of the spring is connected to the inner wall of a thin spherical shell of mass m₂（free length = radius of spherical shell R）. Initially, the spring is vertical, the small ball is at point Q below the force balance point P（distance H）, fixed with a thin string. After cutting the string, the spherical shell rises and falls without collision, and the height of the small ball is the same when lifting off and falling back. 1. Derive the set of formulas for the minimum H；2. If m₁=m₂=m，k=10mg/R，calculate the minimum H（the coefficient is accurate to two significant figures）.
problem_solution_cn: （1）最小H的公式组：- 系统运动分阶段：小球先单独简谐振动（ω₁=√(k/m₁)），球壳升离后系统相对质心简谐振动（ω=√(k(m₁+m₂)/(m₁m₂))）。- 关键条件：球壳无碰撞落地时，小球回到初始高度，联立能量守恒、振动方程，得公式组：$\omega t^* = 2\pi + 2arctan rac{v_S}{\omega h}{$}，$v_S^2 = 2gH +  rac{k}{m_1}{(}H -  rac{m_1 g}{k}{)}^2$（h=R−m₁g/k）。（2）数值计算：- 代入m₁=m₂=m，k=10mg/R，h=R−0.1R=0.9R，ω=√(10g/(2R))=√(5g/R)。- 二分法求解方程，得H≈0.37R。
problem_solution_en: （1）Set of formulas for minimum H：- System motion stages: The small ball first performs simple harmonic motion alone（ω₁=√(k/m₁)），after the spherical shell lifts off, the system performs simple harmonic motion relative to the center of mass（ω=√(k(m₁+m₂)/(m₁m₂))）。- Key condition: When the spherical shell lands without collision, the small ball returns to the initial height, combining energy conservation and vibration equations, obtaining the formula set：$\omega t^* = 2\pi + 2arctan rac{v_S}{\omega h}$，$v_S^2 = 2gH +  rac{k}{m_1}(H -  rac{m_1 g}{k})^2$（h=R−m₁g/k）。（2）Numerical calculation：- Substituting m₁=m₂=m，k=10mg/R，h=R−0.1R=0.9R，ω=√(10g/(2R))=√(5g/R)。- Solving the equation by bisection method, obtaining H≈0.37R。
problem_answer: 1. 最小H的公式组见解析；2. 最小H值$H≈0.37R$
